Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The activities involved are Idea Generation IG Design Draft DD Technical Feasibility Check TFC Cost Evaluation CE Prototype Creation PC Laboratory Testing LT User Testing UT Approval Gate AG Marketing Plan MP and Final Launch FL

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process flow is IG DD TFC and CE parallel PC LT and UT parallel AG MP FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now for each activity I should ensure they all exist in the process so the existence and exactly one constraints would include all activities The initial activity is IG so init would point to IG

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Next the precedence constraints Each activity must follow its predecessors For example DD must come after IG TFC and CE must come after DD PC after TFC and CE etc I need to map each of these relationships into the precedence key of the DECLARE model

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I should also consider other constraints like response but since precedence already covers the required order maybe those are not necessary here

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to make sure all activities are included in existence and exactly one and that the precedence dictionary correctly lists each activitys predecessors

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also the absence and other constraints like noncoexistence are empty because there are no prohibited activities or constraints mentioned in the scenario

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me structure the dictionary step by step Start with existence and exactly one for all activities Then init for IG Then precedence with each activity and its predecessors Check for any missing constraints or errors I think that covers it
